mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_record (txn_id, payer_account_id, payee_account_id, amount, currency, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{txnId}, #{payerAccountId}, #{payeeAccountId}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction_record SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE txn_id = #{txnId}
